ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "song_title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist of the song */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the song was released */,
  "was_first" INTEGER /* Indicates if this was the artist's first song */,
  "has_year" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song has a specified release year */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the song has been played */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the song in seconds */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album the song belongs to */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song contains explicit content */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the song is sung */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the producer of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the artist */,
  "first_release_year" INTEGER /* Year of the artist's first release */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the artist */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the artist */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the artist */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "play_logs" (
  "play_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play event */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song that was played */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who played the song */,
  "play_date" TEXT /* Date when the song was played */,
  "play_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the play event in seconds */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for playback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_logs_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "membership_type" TEXT /* Type of membership the user has */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_active_date" TEXT /* Last date the user was active */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song the metadata belongs to */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the song */,
  "album_art_url" TEXT /* URL to the album art image */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the song */,
  "composer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the composer of the song */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the song */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Exact release date of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_metadata_genre FOREIGN KEY ("genre") REFERENCES song_genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_metadata_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "subgenre" TEXT /* Subgenre of the main genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)
